name: Broiled Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler and prepare a medium-hot grill.
2. Season each flank steak (weighing between 1 and 1 1/2 lbs) with salt, pepper, oregano, and garlic on both sides.
3. Brush the steaks with olive or vegetable oil to prevent charring.
4. Place the seasoned steaks under the hot broiler and cook until browned on one side, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Flip the steaks and continue cooking for an additional 5-7 minutes, ensuring they reach your desired level of doneness.
6. Remove the steaks from the oven and allow them to rest for a few minutes before serving.
